---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with the evolve-loop pipeline
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Phase

Which phase did the issue occur in?

- [ ] Phase 0: MONITOR-INIT
- [ ] Phase 1: DISCOVER
- [ ] Phase 2: PLAN
- [ ] Phase 3: DESIGN
- [ ] Phase 4: BUILD
- [ ] Phase 4.5: CHECKPOINT
- [ ] Phase 5: VERIFY
- [ ] Phase 5.5: EVAL
- [ ] Phase 6: SHIP
- [ ] Phase 7: LOOP+LEARN

## Agent

Which agent was involved? (e.g., evolve-developer, evolve-reviewer)

## Command Used

```
/evolve-loop <arguments>
```

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include error messages or unexpected output.

## Workspace Files

Attach or paste relevant workspace files (e.g., `impl-notes.md`, `eval-report.md`).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.x.x]
- Project language/framework: [e.g., TypeScript/Next.js]
